definition:
1. outside , opposite to ἐντός: 
2. as preposition with genitive outside, out of, far from , with genitive, (Homer): outside of, free from , (Herdotus Historicus), attic; ἐκτὸς ἐλπίδος beyond  hope, Lat. praeter spem, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. of Time, beyond , (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. except , ἐκτὸς ὀλίγων (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. absolute, τὰ ἐκτός external things , (Euripides) 
6. with Verbs of motion, ῥίπτειν ἐκτός to throw out , (Sophocles Tragicus), etc. (ML)
